🚨 Sound Familiar?

Are You Facing These Problems?

Thousands of students struggle with these every year. You're not alone — and there's a proven way out.

📉

Low Mock Test Scores

You study for hours but scores don't reflect it. The gap between effort and results is crushing your confidence.

🔁

Stuck in a Backlog Loop

New chapters pile up while old ones remain incomplete. The syllabus keeps growing, revision never happens.

😰

Exam Stress & Anxiety

NEET pressure affects sleep, focus and performance. You freeze when it matters most.

😕

Concept Confusion

Genetics, organic chemistry, mechanics — some topics just won't click no matter how many times you read them.

🧩

Weak Fundamentals

Shaky Class 11 foundations make Class 12 exponentially harder. Everything crumbles under exam pressure.

🧭

No Personalized Guidance

Generic coaching, zero personalization. Nobody tells you what to focus on for your specific weak areas.

💡 The BT Difference

Why Students Choose Beyond Topper

Engineered for one outcome — getting you into your dream medical college.

👨‍🏫

Expert Faculty Team

10 faculty members with combined 150+ years of experience from PW, Unacademy, Aakash, Resonance & Kota.

📐

Visual Board Teaching

Diagram-first explanations that make the toughest Biology, Chemistry concepts click in minutes.

📝

Daily DPP Sheets

Curated exam-pattern problems daily. No filler — every question is NEET/JEE-relevant.

🎬

5000+ Recorded Lectures

Miss a class? Every session is recorded, available 24/7 on mobile. Watch at your own pace.

📊

Weekly Mock Tests

Full NEET/JEE simulations every week with analytics, rank predictions and gap analysis.

🎯

Personal Mentorship

1-on-1 sessions via WhatsApp and video call. Your weak areas, your strategy, your pace.

💬

Daily Doubt Solving

Ask doubts via text, photo or video — resolved the same day by subject experts.

💰

Truly Affordable

World-class preparation at fees your family can afford. Free scholarship test — up to 90% waiver.

📜 Govt. of India Copyright · Reg. L-9921/2018 · Bolti Kitaab — Physics NEET PYQ
🌟 Lead Mentor

Amit Dixit Sir

Senior Biology Faculty · Author · Bio360 Founder · NEET Specialist

Amit Sir has spent 20+ years mastering the art of making Biology feel simple, visual, and unforgettable. He has taught at India's most prestigious coaching institutes — Physics Wallah, Unacademy, Infinity Learn, Resonance Kota and Bansal Classes — and founded Bio360, his own coaching centre that ran with consistently strong results.

His government copyright-registered book "Bolti Kitaab — Physics NEET Previous 15 Year Question Bank" (published 2018 by Edukad Publication) is used by students across India. His YouTube channel @beyondTopper features thousands of free Biology lectures.

  • 🔬 Senior Biology Faculty — Physics Wallah Recent
  • 📚 Biology Mentor — Unacademy Plus
  • 🧬 Faculty Lead — Infinity Learn 2018 batch (see photo above)
  • 🏫 NEET Faculty — Resonance, Kota
  • 🎓 Senior Tutor — Bansal Classes
  • 🏢 Founder — Bio360 Coaching Centre
📖 Bolti Kitaab — Physics NEET PYQ (Govt. Copyright Reg.)
📗 Objective Biology — NEET Series

Why Parents Trust Beyond Topper

Personal Attention

Verified Experienced Faculty

Hindi + English Teaching

All classes in bilingual mode — clear Hindi explanations with proper English exam terminology. No disadvantage for Hindi-medium students.

❓ FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Will recordings be available if I miss a live class? ▾
Yes. Every live class is recorded and uploaded to your dashboard within 3 hours. You can access all recordings for the full duration of your enrollment and watch at any speed.
Are classes in Hindi or English? ▾
All classes are bilingual — Hindi for clarity, English for exam terminology. No disadvantage for Hindi-medium students. Both work together naturally.
How does the doubt-solving system work? ▾
Submit doubts via WhatsApp as text, photo, or short video. Subject experts respond within 6 hours. Live doubt sessions are also held 5 days a week.
Can a complete beginner join? ▾
Absolutely. Our curriculum builds from fundamentals systematically. A free diagnostic test on enrollment helps us personalize your learning plan from day one.
How do I attend the free demo class? ▾
Fill the form on this page. Our counselor calls you within 2 hours to schedule your free demo. No payment, no obligations. You also receive free study material just for attending.
What is the scholarship test? ▾
A free 30-minute online MCQ test at Class 10 level (PCB). Score 70%+ earns 50% fee waiver. Score 85%+ earns 90% fee waiver. You can take it right after booking your demo.
What about the Bolti Kitaab book? ▾
Amit Sir's government copyright-registered book "Bolti Kitaab — Physics NEET Previous 15 Year Question Bank" (Reg. L-9921/2018) is available for enrolled students. Contact us on WhatsApp for details.
